title: cytisus supinus var. javorkae
intro: Cytisus supinus var. javorkae, also known as Spiny Rockrose, is a shrubby perennial plant in the legume family, native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Cytisus supinus var. javorkae include relief from digestive issues, reduction of menstrual cramps, and alleviation of respiratory problems such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
